Value: Gluten (Wheat), Shellfish (Crustacean, Shrimp), Finfish Roe, Allium (onions), Eggs, Finfish, Capsaicin, MSG
in a fryer set to ~350°F, fry the crispy shrimp for 2-3 minutes until golden and heated thoroughly
Drain excess oil over the fryer, then transfer to a medium mixing bowl
Add tobiko and spicy mayo and toss until shrimp is fully coated
Transfer to glass plate lined with bamboo on the top lip
